claim_bullets.bullet_text: A character wielding weapons in both hands has three possible attack styles (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.264-268).
Throwing weapons have a 20‑meter range limit; shooting weapons, 100 m (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.264-268).
Each throwing or shooting weapon has a maximum range per Table 16‑4 (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.264-268).

source_record_text: The Combat Options section outlines optional combat rules for dual‑wielding, projectile range limits, and weapon maximum ranges.
